title: Finding items with no assigned owner or people
excerpt: How can I find items created but not assigned to an owner or people? Is there a search everything syntax that I’m missing?

posts.author: MKBlazek (MK Blazek)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I find items created but not assigned to an owner or people? Is there a search everything syntax that I’m missing?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MKBlazek - Do you want to find all of them across your entire account? Or within a board? Let me know and I’ll do a screenshot or video clip to show you best method.

posts.author: MKBlazek (MK Blazek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Thanks - across the entire account. We’re still getting our system set up, and I think there are some items out there with no date and with no owner…and so those orphans aren’t being attended to!

Thanks!

posts.author: okennis (Olivia Kennis)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @MKBlazek – using the Filter button on the top of your board (either a Tornado looking icon or a Funnel icon), you can navigate to the column you’d like to filter by and choose the Blank/Unassigned option. This will filter all of the board data by all items where someone is not assigned. Hope this helps!
